projects.name: AeroScan
projects.shortDescription: Inspecting towers, turbines, and pipelines is dangerous, slow, and costly when done by people climbing or flying manually. AeroScan provides the autonomous-flight and perception stack for drones to inspect tall and remote infrastructure and detect defects. Target market: energy, telecom, and infrastructure asset owners.
features: Autonomous inspection flight planning and execution
Defect detection (corrosion, cracks, damage) from imagery

impact.social: Removes humans from dangerous inspection work.
impact.economic: Cuts inspection cost and downtime versus manual methods.
impact.environmental: Early defect detection prevents leaks and failures with environmental impact.
impact.technological: Advances autonomous infrastructure inspection.

projects.name: WindWise
projects.shortDescription: Wind farms underperform and incur high maintenance cost because turbines aren't continuously optimized or monitored. WindWise optimizes turbine performance and predicts failures from SCADA and sensor data. Target market: wind-farm operators and turbine OEMs.
features: Component-failure prediction from vibration and SCADA

impact.social: Supports reliable clean-energy supply.
impact.economic: Wake-steering and prognostics can lift output a few percent and cut maintenance cost.
impact.environmental: More energy per turbine improves renewable yield.
impact.technological: Advances wind-turbine optimization and prognostics.

projects.name: DriveSense
projects.shortDescription: Autonomous-driving systems fail on rare, ambiguous edge cases that are hard to perceive and predict. DriveSense is a perception-and-prediction stack focused on robust handling of edge cases and uncertainty for autonomous vehicles. Target market: autonomous-vehicle developers and ADAS suppliers.
features: Robust multi-sensor perception in adverse conditions
Behavior prediction for other road users

impact.social: Improves road safety as autonomy scales.
impact.economic: Reducing edge-case failures is the key barrier to AV deployment value.
impact.environmental: Efficient autonomy can reduce emissions per trip.
impact.technological: Advances robust AV perception and prediction.

projects.name: AssayAI
projects.shortDescription: Drug discovery generates mountains of microscopy and assay images that analysts can't fully or consistently interpret. AssayAI analyzes high-content screening imagery to quantify cellular responses and surface promising compounds. Target market: pharma and biotech drug-discovery teams and CROs.

impact.social: Speeds discovery of therapies for unmet needs.
impact.economic: Higher-throughput, consistent analysis compresses discovery timelines.
impact.environmental: Fewer redundant assays reduce reagent waste.
impact.technological: Advances high-content screening image analysis.

projects.name: HeatLoop
projects.shortDescription: Industry dumps vast amounts of waste heat that could be recovered, but capturing and reusing it is poorly optimized. HeatLoop identifies waste-heat recovery opportunities and optimizes recovery systems for energy and cost savings. Target market: energy-intensive manufacturers and industrial-process plants.
features: Integration with on-site and district heating

impact.social: Improves industrial efficiency and competitiveness.
impact.economic: Waste-heat recovery can cut plant energy bills significantly with strong payback.
impact.environmental: Reusing waste heat directly reduces fuel use and emissions.
impact.technological: Advances waste-heat recovery optimization.

projects.name: QuakeNet
projects.shortDescription: Most earthquake-prone regions lack dense enough sensing to give people the seconds of warning that save lives. QuakeNet builds a dense low-cost seismic sensor network with detection algorithms for earthquake early warning. Target market: governments, cities, and infrastructure operators in seismic zones.
features: Rapid P-wave detection and magnitude estimation
Open data for research and response

impact.social: Seconds of warning let people take cover and systems shut down safely.
impact.economic: Automated responses prevent damage and reduce post-quake losses.
impact.environmental: Triggered shutoffs reduce post-quake fires and leaks.
impact.technological: Advances dense-network earthquake early warning.

projects.name: LegacyLift
projects.shortDescription: Critical systems run on decades-old code (COBOL, legacy stacks) that few engineers understand and migration is risky and slow. LegacyLift analyzes, documents, and assists migration of legacy codebases to modern platforms. Target market: banks, insurers, governments, and enterprises with legacy systems.
features: Equivalence testing between old and new

impact.social: Protects critical services that millions depend on from legacy fragility.
impact.economic: Reduces the enormous cost and risk of legacy maintenance and migration.
impact.environmental: Modern efficient systems can reduce compute energy.
impact.technological: Advances legacy-code understanding and migration.

projects.name: ChargeGrid
projects.shortDescription: EV charging networks suffer from poor station placement, grid strain, and inefficient charging that frustrates drivers. ChargeGrid optimizes charger placement, smart-charging schedules, and grid impact across a network. Target market: charging-network operators, fleets, and utilities.
features: Smart-charging scheduling to flatten grid demand

impact.social: Makes EV charging reliable and accessible, supporting electrification.
impact.economic: Smart charging cuts demand charges and improves charger ROI.
impact.environmental: Renewable-aligned charging maximizes clean-energy use.
impact.technological: Advances charging-network and smart-charging optimization.

projects.name: AquaControl
projects.shortDescription: Water and wastewater treatment plants run conservatively and energy-intensively because operators can't continuously optimize complex processes. AquaControl optimizes treatment processes for water quality, energy, and chemical use in real time. Target market: municipal and industrial water/wastewater utilities.

impact.social: Protects public health and water resources.
impact.economic: Optimization can cut treatment energy and chemical costs notably.
impact.environmental: Lower energy and chemical use and reliable effluent quality protect waterways.
impact.technological: Advances water-treatment process control.

projects.name: MolForge
projects.shortDescription: Designing new small-molecule drug candidates is slow, with chemists exploring a vast space mostly by intuition. MolForge uses generative models to design candidate molecules toward target properties and screen them for feasibility. Target market: pharma and biotech medicinal-chemistry teams.
features: Generative molecule design toward target properties

impact.social: Accelerates discovery of new therapies for unmet medical needs.
impact.economic: Compresses early discovery, reducing time and cost per candidate.
impact.environmental: Fewer dead-end syntheses reduce lab resource use.
impact.technological: Advances generative molecular design.

projects.name: TerraScan
projects.shortDescription: Satellite imagery holds answers about land, climate, and infrastructure, but extracting them requires scarce geospatial expertise. TerraScan is a geospatial analysis platform with foundation models that let analysts query Earth-observation data in plain terms. Target market: governments, NGOs, insurers, and analysts working with geospatial data.
features: Custom model fine-tuning for new tasks
Scalable processing of large imagery archives

impact.social: Democratizes Earth insight for climate, disaster, and development decisions.
impact.economic: Cuts the cost of geospatial analysis and broadens who can do it.
impact.environmental: Enables monitoring of deforestation, water, and climate impacts.
impact.technological: Advances geospatial foundation models and analysis.

projects.name: CobotTeach
projects.shortDescription: Small manufacturers can't afford the specialists needed to program collaborative robots for changing tasks. CobotTeach lets non-experts program cobots by demonstration and natural instruction, making automation accessible. Target market: small-and-mid-size manufacturers and automation integrators.
features: Skill library and reusable task blocks

impact.social: Brings automation to smaller manufacturers and upskills workers.
impact.economic: Lowers automation cost and addresses labor shortages.
impact.environmental: Efficient automation reduces scrap and rework.
impact.technological: Advances intuitive robot programming.

projects.name: TinyForge
projects.shortDescription: Running ML on cheap microcontrollers and sensors is hard because models are too big and tools are fragmented. TinyForge compresses, quantizes, and deploys ML models to severely constrained edge devices. Target market: embedded-systems and IoT engineering teams.
features: Model compression and quantization for microcontrollers

impact.social: Enables smart, private features on affordable everyday devices.
impact.economic: Cuts hardware cost by fitting ML onto cheap chips at scale.
impact.environmental: Tiny efficient models use minimal power across billions of devices.
impact.technological: Advances TinyML and edge-model optimization.

projects.name: GlucoSense
projects.shortDescription: People with diabetes endure painful finger-pricks or costly sensors to track glucose, hurting adherence. GlucoSense develops the signal-processing and modeling to estimate glucose from non-invasive optical and wearable signals. Target market: diabetes-device makers, wearable companies, and people with diabetes.
features: Non-invasive glucose estimation from optical/wearable signals

impact.social: Could make glucose monitoring painless and accessible, improving adherence.
impact.economic: Reduces the recurring cost of consumable sensors and test strips.
impact.environmental: Reduces single-use sensor and strip waste.
impact.technological: Advances non-invasive biosensing signal processing.

projects.name: SubSurface
projects.shortDescription: Geothermal, carbon-storage, and groundwater projects fail or cost more when the subsurface is poorly characterized. SubSurface uses seismic and geophysical inversion to image the subsurface and de-risk siting decisions. Target market: geothermal developers, carbon-storage operators, and water/resource agencies.
features: Monitoring of injected CO2 or fluids

impact.social: De-risks clean-energy and storage projects affecting communities.
impact.economic: Better characterization avoids costly dry holes and failures.
impact.environmental: Enables geothermal and safe carbon storage at scale.
impact.technological: Advances geophysical inversion and subsurface imaging.

projects.name: PlasmaPilot
projects.shortDescription: Fusion reactors require split-second plasma control that human operators and slow controllers can't reliably achieve. PlasmaPilot provides real-time plasma-control optimization to maintain stable, high-performance fusion plasmas. Target market: fusion research labs and emerging fusion-energy companies.
features: Real-time plasma shape and stability control

impact.social: Advances a potentially transformative clean-energy source.
impact.economic: Better control accelerates the path to viable fusion energy.
impact.environmental: Fusion promises abundant low-carbon energy.
impact.technological: Advances real-time plasma control.

projects.name: DesalOpt
projects.shortDescription: Desalination is energy-hungry and expensive, limiting its role in solving water scarcity. DesalOpt optimizes reverse-osmosis desalination operations to cut energy use and membrane fouling while maintaining output. Target market: desalination-plant operators and water utilities in water-stressed regions.
features: Real-time RO operation optimization for energy

impact.social: Makes desalinated water more affordable for water-stressed populations.
impact.economic: Energy is the dominant desal cost; optimization improves unit economics.
impact.environmental: Lower energy and better brine management reduce impact.
impact.technological: Advances desalination process optimization.

projects.name: HiveWatch
projects.shortDescription: Pollinator decline threatens food supply, but beekeepers lack early insight into hive health and stressors. HiveWatch monitors hive acoustics, temperature, and weight to detect disease, swarming, and colony stress early. Target market: commercial and hobbyist beekeepers and pollination-dependent growers.

impact.social: Protects pollinators essential to the food system.
impact.economic: Early intervention reduces costly colony losses for beekeepers.
impact.environmental: Healthier pollinators support biodiversity and crop yields.
impact.technological: Advances bioacoustic hive monitoring.

projects.name: VoxLow
projects.shortDescription: Most of the world's languages have little or no speech technology, excluding billions from voice interfaces and digital services. VoxLow is a toolkit for building speech recognition and synthesis for low-resource languages with minimal data. Target market: governments, NGOs, researchers, and developers serving underserved language communities.
features: Community data collection and validation tools

impact.social: Brings voice access and digital inclusion to excluded language communities.
impact.economic: Enables services and markets previously inaccessible by language.
impact.environmental: Negligible direct footprint.
impact.technological: Advances low-resource speech technology.

projects.name: ScanTriage
projects.shortDescription: Radiology backlogs delay diagnosis, and urgent findings can wait in queue behind routine scans. ScanTriage prioritizes imaging worklists by detecting likely critical findings and flagging them for immediate review. Target market: radiology departments, teleradiology providers, and hospitals.

impact.social: Gets urgent diagnoses to patients faster.
impact.economic: Reduces dangerous delays and improves department efficiency.
impact.environmental: Negligible direct footprint.
impact.technological: Advances imaging triage and worklist prioritization.

projects.name: FieldSwarm
projects.shortDescription: Large-scale farming relies on heavy machinery that compacts soil and can't act plant-by-plant. FieldSwarm coordinates fleets of small autonomous robots for precise weeding, seeding, and monitoring across fields. Target market: large farms, agricultural-robotics developers, and regenerative-ag operations.

impact.social: Reduces chemical use and grueling field labor.
impact.economic: Precise per-plant action cuts input costs and improves yields.
impact.environmental: Less soil compaction and targeted action reduce environmental harm.
impact.technological: Advances multi-robot agricultural coordination.

projects.name: GridBid
projects.shortDescription: Electricity-market participants leave money on the table and risk imbalance penalties due to poor price and load forecasting. GridBid forecasts wholesale power prices and optimizes market bidding for generators, storage, and traders. Target market: power generators, storage operators, and energy traders.

impact.social: More efficient markets support reliable, affordable power.
impact.economic: Better forecasting and bidding capture significant trading value.
impact.environmental: Optimized storage dispatch supports renewable integration.
impact.technological: Advances power-price forecasting and bidding optimization.

projects.name: HuntAI
projects.shortDescription: Sophisticated attackers evade signature-based defenses and dwell in networks for months undetected. HuntAI proactively hunts for threats by detecting subtle behavioral anomalies across logs and telemetry. Target market: enterprise security operations and threat-hunting teams.

impact.social: Reduces the impact of breaches on people and institutions.
impact.economic: Cutting attacker dwell time sharply reduces breach cost.
impact.environmental: Negligible direct footprint.
impact.technological: Advances behavioral threat detection and hunting.

projects.name: MethaneScan
projects.shortDescription: Methane is a potent greenhouse gas, but most leaks from oil, gas, and waste sites go undetected and unattributed. MethaneScan detects and quantifies methane plumes from satellite and aerial data and attributes them to sources. Target market: regulators, energy operators, and climate-monitoring organizations.
features: Methane plume detection from satellite/aerial imagery

impact.social: Drives accountability for a major near-term climate driver.
impact.economic: Fixing leaks recovers saleable gas and avoids penalties.
impact.environmental: Methane has ~80x CO2 warming potency over 20 years; cuts are high-impact.
impact.technological: Advances remote methane detection and attribution.

projects.name: SteadyHand
projects.shortDescription: Surgical precision is limited by human tremor, fatigue, and the difficulty of working in tiny or hard-to-reach anatomy. SteadyHand provides motion stabilization, tremor filtering, and guidance to enhance surgeon precision and safety. Target market: surgical-robotics developers and hospitals performing precision procedures.
features: Procedure logging for review and training

impact.social: Improves surgical outcomes and safety for patients.
impact.economic: Fewer complications reduce costly revisions and stays.
impact.environmental: Negligible direct footprint.
impact.technological: Advances surgical motion assistance and guidance.

projects.name: UltraScan
projects.shortDescription: Manufacturers rely on slow manual interpretation of ultrasonic and other non-destructive tests, missing subtle defects. UltraScan analyzes non-destructive-testing signals to detect and characterize internal defects automatically. Target market: aerospace, energy, and heavy-manufacturing quality teams.

impact.social: Improves safety of critical components people depend on.
impact.economic: Faster, more consistent inspection cuts cost and missed defects.
impact.environmental: Catching defects early reduces scrap and rework waste.
impact.technological: Advances automated non-destructive testing analysis.

projects.name: HelioWatch
projects.shortDescription: Solar storms can disrupt power grids, satellites, aviation, and communications with little warning. HelioWatch forecasts space weather and its impacts to protect critical infrastructure. Target market: grid operators, satellite operators, aviation, and government agencies.

impact.social: Protects infrastructure that society depends on from space-weather damage.
impact.economic: Lead time enables protective actions that avoid costly outages and losses.
impact.environmental: Negligible direct footprint.
impact.technological: Advances space-weather forecasting and impact modeling.

projects.name: ImmunoForge
projects.shortDescription: Designing vaccines and immunotherapies is slow because predicting which targets trigger effective, safe immune responses is hard. ImmunoForge uses computational immunology to design epitopes and immunogens and prioritize candidates. Target market: vaccine developers, immunotherapy researchers, and biotech R&D.

impact.social: Speeds development of vaccines and immunotherapies for unmet needs.
impact.economic: Focusing experiments compresses costly discovery timelines.
impact.environmental: Reduces redundant wet-lab resource use.
impact.technological: Advances computational vaccine and immunogen design.
